Live Webinar presented by Harness |
Q&A moderated by InfoQ

 

Save your Seat!

Engineering for the Agentic Era: How to Spec, Build, Test, and Operate AI-Powered Systems

WHEN: Thursday, July 16, 2026 1:00 PM - 2:00 PM EDT

Agentic AI systems expose gaps in how teams define work, verify behavior, and operate software. This session covers Spec-Driven Development, agent architecture principles, and operational readiness — a practical framework for AI-native delivery.
 

Save your Seat
